verses.3: You have reproached me ten times.
verses.4: If it is true that I have erred,
verses.5: If indeed you will magnify yourselves against me,
verses.6: know now that God has subverted me,
verses.7: “Behold, I cry out of wrong, but I am not heard.
verses.8: He has walled up my way so that I can’t pass,
verses.9: He has stripped me of my glory,
verses.10: He has broken me down on every side, and I am gone.
verses.11: He has also kindled his wrath against me.
verses.13: “He has put my brothers far from me.
verses.15: Those who dwell in my house and my maids consider me a stranger.
verses.16: I call to my servant, and he gives me no answer.
verses.17: My breath is offensive to my wife.
verses.19: All my familiar friends abhor me.
verses.20: My bones stick to my skin and to my flesh.
verses.21: “Have pity on me. Have pity on me, you my friends,
verses.22: Why do you persecute me as God,
verses.23: “Oh that my words were now written!
verses.24: That with an iron pen and lead
verses.25: But as for me, I know that my Redeemer lives.
verses.27: whom I, even I, will see on my side.
verses.28: If you say, ‘How we will persecute him!’
